builtinServersDescriptions.brave_search: [to be translated]:An MCP server implementation integrating the Brave Search API, providing both web and local search functionalities. Requires configuring the BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable
builtinServersDescriptions.browser: [to be translated]:Control a headless Electron window via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Tools: open URL, execute single-line JS, reset session.

builtinServersDescriptions.fetch: [to be translated]:MCP server for retrieving URL web content
builtinServersDescriptions.filesystem: [to be translated]:A Node.js server implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for file system operations. Requires configuration of directories allowed for access.
builtinServersDescriptions.flomo: [to be translated]:Connect to flomo to quickly capture notes and ideas via AI. Requires flomo account authorization.
builtinServersDescriptions.memory: [to be translated]:Persistent memory implementation based on a local knowledge graph. This enables the model to remember user-related information across different conversations. Requires configuring the MEMORY_FILE_PATH environment variable.
builtinServersDescriptions.nowledge_mem: [to be translated]:Requires Nowledge Mem app running locally. Keeps AI chats, tools, notes, agents, and files in private memory on your computer. Download from https://mem.nowledge.co/
builtinServersDescriptions.python: [to be translated]:Execute Python code in a secure sandbox environment. Run Python with Pyodide, supporting most standard libraries and scientific computing packages
builtinServersDescriptions.sequentialthinking: [to be translated]:A MCP server implementation that provides tools for dynamic and reflective problem solving through structured thinking processes
